channel.title: Attribution on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Attribution on LiaScript

item.title: Wikimedia for LiaScript: Embed Media with Automatic Attribution
item.description: Open Educational Resources live and die by proper attribution. When you embed a photo, audio recording, or video from Wikimedia Commons in your course, you are legally required to credit the author, name the license, and link back to the source. That’s three to five fields per media file — easy to get wrong, easy to forget entirely.
